name: Mobile-AI-TestOps AI Automation Solution
goal: Build a unified AI automation testing platform for mobile and PC/Web test cases, with per-case evidence and plan-level reports.
core_principles: Mobile automation uses Open-AutoGLM as the executor.
PC/Web automation uses agent-browser as the executor.
The AI planner rewrites human test cases into stable executable task briefs.
The judgement agent evaluates results from logs, screenshots, page state, and expected results.
Reports preserve step evidence instead of only storing final status.

execution_phases.description: Bring the device to the test start state.
Capture final evidence and judge whether expected result is met.

pc_web.note: agent-browser is CLI-first. Realtime Electron browser rendering should be auxiliary, not the core evidence mechanism.
execution_loop: capture current URL, title, interactive snapshot, and page text
ask PC Agent for next structured action
pause with need_user when login, captcha, QR code, 2FA, payment, or sensitive authorization is detected
resume from current browser state after user confirms

routing_rules.when: platform_type is app, wechat_mini, android_app, ios_app, or harmony_app

routing_rules.executor: ask user or infer from target_app and steps

phases.name: Mobile execution stability
phases.output: Mobile test cases run through Open-AutoGLM

phases.name: PC/Web execution MVP
phases.output: PC AutoExecute can run AI-driven browser tasks

phases.name: Manual takeover
phases.output: Real business login flows can be handled

phases.name: Unified test case dispatch
phases.output: One Excel/CSV can run mobile and PC/Web cases

phases.name: Judgement agent
phases.output: Execution completion is separated from test success

final_user_flow: Platform routes each case by platform_type.
User selects mobile device or PC/Web environment.
Manual takeover is triggered for login or verification.
User resumes execution after manual handling.
short_term_recommendation: Change PC AutoExecute from realtime-browser-first to step-screenshot-first.
Integrate PC Agent into the test case execution entry.
Route mobile platform types to Open-AutoGLM.
Use the same ReportWriter for mobile and PC/Web reports.
